title: PRD: CSV export of raw data
text:
# PRD — CSV export of raw data
Product area: Reporting & Export
Status: Approved
Author: Product team

## Problem
Customers repeatedly request csv export of raw data. This appears in support tickets and NPS feedback for the Reporting & Export area.

## Proposed solution
Implement csv export of raw data with configuration in workspace settings.

## Success metrics
Reduce Reporting & Export-related complaints by 30%; adoption > 40% in 60 days.

## Priority
Committed for next quarter.
